Phase Status
0 of 9 phases done
01
Strategy & Direction
Gokul  ·  Days 1–10
  • Monthly content themes locked
  • Campaign ideas + hooks finalised
  • References, moodboards, narrative built
  • Deck creation begins — master doc
  • Task assignment starts Day 3
02
Design + Video Production
Ricky + Video  ·  Days 4–14
  • Static creatives, carousels, reels begin
  • Video shoots + edits run in parallel
  • Copy written alongside design — not after
  • Daily internal check-ins
03
Compile & Internal Review
Gokul  ·  Days 14–16
  • All assets collected in one place
  • Final copy locked
  • Brand consistency check
  • Remove weak creatives — don't send everything
04
Client Share
Gokul → Client  ·  Day 17
  • Send structured deck — not random files
  • Clear flow: Campaign → Content → Execution
  • Add short context for each set
05
Client Feedback Window
Client  ·  Days 17–21
  • Follow-up on Day 19 — don't wait silently
  • Push for consolidated feedback
  • No execution changes before feedback is complete
06
Revisions
Ricky  ·  Days 21–24
  • Apply approved feedback only
  • No extra creative exploration
  • Lock final assets
07
Final Delivery
Gokul  ·  Day 25
  • Final files delivered to client
08
Scheduling
Gokul  ·  Day 27
  • Schedule all approved content
09
Loona Internal Days 🔴 ACTIVE
Full Team  ·  Days 27–31
  • Internal review
  • Next cycle planning
  • Archive current month

☁️ Connect Real-time Sync

Paste your Firebase config below. Once connected, everyone on the team sees changes live.

👉 console.firebase.google.com → New project → Realtime Database → Project Settings → Add web app → copy the config object.

After connecting, hit 💾 Save and share the downloaded file (or upload to Netlify) so the team auto-connects.
